name: Road to AI
description: A cold-start-friendly path from math foundations to world models.

tiers.name: Prelude
tiers.blurb: How this curriculum works. The first steps before real material — environment, mindset, how to read a paper.

tiers.name: Math Foundations
tiers.blurb: Linear algebra, calculus, and the intuition for gradient descent. The vocabulary every modern ML method inherits from.

tiers.name: Classical ML
tiers.blurb: Probability, statistics, and the pre-deep-learning canon — linear models, trees, kernels, the bias-variance story.

tiers.name: Symbolic AI
tiers.blurb: GOFAI lineage: logic, search, planning, expert systems. Classical roots that modern agents are rediscovering.

tiers.name: Deep Learning
tiers.blurb: Neural nets, backprop, convolutions, transformers. The architecture-first era that ate the world after 2012.

tiers.name: Reinforcement Learning
tiers.blurb: From bandits and MDPs to modern policy gradient. The thread woven through every agent.

tiers.name: LLMs
tiers.blurb: Language models from n-grams to trillion-parameter transformers. Pretraining, scaling laws, alignment.

tiers.name: Agentic AI
tiers.blurb: Tool use, planning, memory, multi-agent orchestration. The reunion of symbolic and learned reasoning.

tiers.name: World Models
tiers.blurb: Learning a model of reality itself. The frontier — and where this road leads.
